name: @rocketride/aparavi-ui
description: Aparavi AQL Chat — natural-language query interface for Aparavi data

appManifest.name: Aparavi AQL
appManifest.description: Chat with your Aparavi data using natural language

settings.label: Aparavi Server URL
settings.description: Base URL of the Aparavi platform API (e.g. https://app.aparavi.com)

settings.label: Aparavi User ID
settings.description: User ID for authenticating with the Aparavi API

settings.label: Aparavi Password
settings.description: Password for authenticating with the Aparavi API
